specific_question: When did Emily Chen complete MediConn Solutions' quarterly consumer behavior survey in 2025?
answer: Emily Chen completed data collection for MediConn Solutions' quarterly consumer behavior survey on February 20, 2025, with results compiled and distributed to leadership by the end of February 2025.
